Discover the new ski fleece collection for women

Dope Snow has ski fleeces for women in all shapes: half zips, casual sweaters, thick shearlings, you name it. Whether you're skiing, snowboarding, or just posted up at the resort, we've got fleeced garments that work for any weather condition.

Warmth, breathability, and protection for winter

Looking for a layer that actually handles the cold? A fleece pullover traps air between its fibres, and that trapped air is what keeps you warm during winter activities. Simple concept, but it works. The focus here is warmth without giving up protection from wind and weather.

Materials, designs and technical features for skiing

The polyester fleeces we use are warm, comfortable, and great at letting moisture escape from your skin. So you stay dry, not damp and clammy, even in cold weather outdoors. They keep you protected when it counts.

From lightweight midlayers to thick shearlings

Quick-drying and easy to clean, too. The lightweight, breathable ski fleeces are the best midlayers for a day in the mountains. And the thick, warm shearlings? Perfect as a fleece jacket for cold winter nights at the ski hills or a walk through the city. Stylish either way.

Zipped or unzipped, we've got both. They work for colder and milder conditions alike. Casual sweaters come in different styles too, and we sell a variety of accessories to go with everything.

Get the latest colour options and choose your women's fleece style

Colours go from black, white, blue, grey, and green all the way to prints and patterns. Sizes range from XS to XL. Check out the new winter collections of women's fleeces at Dopesnow.com, pick your favourite: hooded, high collar, or half zip. Choose the colour or pattern you like, match it all to your ski equipment, and get ready for the snowy season.

READ: MID LAYER BUYING GUIDE / DON'T FORGET YOUR THERMALS

Snow+Rock is the place to find the best women's fleeces and mid-layers. We stock an extensive hand-picked selection of stylish performance mid-layers and fleeces to suit any adventure. All from top brands including Passenger, Patagonia, and The North Face. Our fleeces and mid-layers are ideal for staying warm and comfortable in cold weather. They're ideal for winter sports such as skiing and snowboarding as well as everyday wear. Using versatile designs and fabrics, they can also be used for added insulation on colder nights. If you're looking for the best women's fleeces and mid-layers, look no further. We have a wide selection of products from top brands, to keep you prepared, insulated, and comfortable for the upcoming seasons with our ski fleeces, snowboard fleeces, and new-season clothing.

Women’s fleeces offer excellent warmth and insulation by trapping heat close to the body, making them ideal for cold weather. They’re lightweight, breathable, and quick-drying, allowing moisture to escape and keeping you comfortable during active pursuits like hiking, skiing, or walking. 

Yes, fleeces are perfect for layering. Their lightweight and versatile design means they can be worn comfortably over base layers or under waterproof jackets, adapting easily to changing weather conditions without adding bulk. 

Fleeces are softer and lighter than many insulated or down jackets. The fabric’s plush texture feels comfortable against the skin, and the material’s low weight makes fleeces easy to pack and wear for extended periods without feeling heavy or stuffy. 

Fleeces are generally water-resistant, meaning they can handle light drizzles or snow but are not fully waterproof. For heavy rain, it’s best to pair a fleece with a waterproof shell. Their quick-drying nature ensures they remain comfortable even if they get damp. 

Look for features like full-length zippers for ventilation, zippered pockets for secure storage, adjustable hems, and fitted hoods for extra warmth. Some fleeces also offer reinforced areas for durability and are available in various thicknesses to suit different activities and temperatures.

Women's Ski Pullovers: Warmth and Style on the Slopes

Women's ski pullovers are an essential part of your ski gear. With a wide range of colours available, you’re sure to find the perfect pullover. These pullovers keep you warm while skiing and provide plenty of freedom of movement on the slopes. You’ll be spending long hours on the mountain. A good ski pullover keeps you warm and dry, allowing you to enjoy a relaxed feel with a suitable midlayer underneath your ski jacket.

Benefits of Women's Ski Pullovers

When choosing a ski pullover, it's important to consider the benefits of the materials used. Good insulation and effective moisture management are essential. A pullover with proper lining will keep you warm, even in chilly conditions. Flat seams make the fabric comfortable to wear, which is beneficial during intense descents. The fit is crucial; a longer cut offers extra protection against wind and snow.

Colours and Styles for Every Taste

Ski pullovers come in a wide variety of colours and styles. You can opt for soft pastel shades or a classic hue. You’ll always find an option that complements your ski wardrobe. Multicoloured designs provide a playful look, while neutral tones exude calmness. The right colour and style make a fashion statement. They also enhance your visibility on the slopes, which increases your safety.

  • lining retains warmth
  • Longer fit provides extra protection
  • Wide selection of colours and styles

Women's Fleece Jackets

Here at Columbia, you’ll find a women’s fleece jacket collection with a wide range of colours and styles in both smaller and larger sizes. Our fleece products are divided into 4 main categories that you can browse through:

...
  • Sherpa Fleeces
  • Technical Fleeces
  • Casual Fleeces
  • Fleece Gilets

Apart from vests and jackets, you’ll also find baselayers, trousers and sweatshirt options in our fleece collection.

Sherpa, technical, casual and gilets

If you’re obsessed with the wonderful softness of sherpa fleeces, you can explore our women’s sherpa fleece category. Sherpa fleece is plush, cosy and comforting. Our sherpa clothes will give you the sensation of wearing a toasty blanket—without sacrificing your mobility.

Choose a cosy sherpa fleece hoodie to keep your neck, face and head warm and toasty on chilly days. To face your coldest winter adventures, you can throw on a versatile and long sherpa fleece coat.

A technical fleece for women is a great option when you have to avoid the cold as you participate in sports activities. Technical fleeces are breathable, lightweight and are equipped with advanced wicking technology. In the collection, you’ll find fleece jackets with features such as thumb holes and chin guards. Many are also designed with practical pockets such as arm sleeve pockets and zippered chest pockets.

Our technical fleeces are versatile and can be worn in most seasons. If you’re heading on a winter hike or a ski adventure, a technical fleece jacket can be a perfect layer under a women’s hiking jacket or one of our women’s ski jackets. It will keep you warm and dry on your outdoor quests, so you can stay active for as long as you’d like.

You can also wear a technical fleece as a top layer when the weather is milder. It’s a convenient layer to throw on when you’re going for a quick run on a chilly spring evening. The comfortable stretch means that you can keep going for longer.

Another category in our fleece collection is our casual fleeces, where you’ll find our popular half zip fleece women’s jackets. Casual fleeces have a more relaxed design and are a comfortable option for urban activities. During the colder season, they work well as a layer under an urban women’s coat. You’ll find quarter zip, half zip, and full zip options among our casual fleeces.

Finally, we have our fleece gilet women’s category. In this category, you’ll find sherpa fleece vests that keep your core warm while simultaneously showing off the cute pattern on your long sleeve shirt. You’ll also find practical technical fleece gilets with advanced insulation that maintain a perfect temperature during your hike.

Wicking and repellency technologies in our fleeces

Columbia women's fleeces feature various technologies to keep you warm and dry—inside and out.

  • Omni‑Wick™ is our enhanced wicking technology that allows for quick moisture evaporation. Fleeces with Omni‑Wick™ make sure you stay dry during active sports. The wicking tech keeps moisture away from your skin and distributes it through the surface of your clothing.
  • Omni‑Shield™ is our advanced repellency technology that provides your clothes with a water repellent treatment. This makes your fleece jacket water and stain repellent. Omni‑Shield™ fleeces keep you dry in light showers so you head out without fear of the weather changing.

Find your new better-than-perfect fleece

Columbia is not the only outdoor clothing brand that sells fleece products for women. But when you choose a fleece from Columbia, you’re getting a jacket that has gone through thorough testing. The fleece you get is not only soft and warm, but also breathable and lightweight. Columbia Sportswear's founder, “Tough Mother” Gert Boyle, had the motto: “It’s perfect. Now make it better.” And we hear that voice everytime we design a new piece of outerwear.

To find the perfect women’s fleece for you, don’t buy just any jacket you see after a quick look in the shops. First of all, you should find a fleece that is designed for the activity you’ll want to wear it for. Consider if you’re looking for a piece of clothing to wear for urban activities or for sports activities. Your future fleece should also fit your personal style. Use the online shop filters to browse through the many styles and colours available in our fleece collection. There are both more neutral and plain shades and playful patterns and colour combinations to choose from.

Choose wisely, and you’ll find a fleece that you can enjoy adventuring in for years!

How to Choose the Right Ski Fleeces

Ski fleeces play an essential role in your layering system by providing breathable insulation between your base layer and outer shell. A functional ski fleece helps manage temperature regulation, traps body heat efficiently, and offers comfort during winter activities without adding unnecessary weight. As part of your entire ski outfit, a fleece supports warmth on the lift while remaining breathable enough for intense activity on the slopes. With a variety of colours, fits, and styles available, it is easy to find a comfortable mid layer that feels perfect for cold mountain conditions.

Choosing the right fleece ensures you stay warm, dry, and ready to enjoy full days outdoors. Fleece jackets can be worn for a variety of activities and will keep you warm on the coldest of days. Trespass has fleece jackets for men, women and children too, so the whole family can get toasty! We use anti-pil material, so your fleece will stay bobble free and withstand multiple washes. Wear underneath one of our superb ski jackets for the ultimate in cold busting layering.

  • Types of Ski Fleeces

Technical ski fleeces come in several styles, each offering different levels of warmth, movement, and breathability. Understanding these types helps you select a piece that suits your skiing style and preferred layer combination.

  • Microfleece: Lightweight and highly breathable for active skiing and milder weather, offering quick drying comfort.
  • Midweight fleece: Ideal for most ski conditions, providing a dependable warmth to weight balance for days on the mountain.
  • Heavyweight fleece: Offers extra warmth for cold resort conditions or low output activity when insulation matters most.
  • Stretch or grid fleece: Crafted for movement with flexible fabrics and moisture control, ideal for touring or fast paced skiing.

With these options, you can choose the layer that delivers warmth and comfort across your chosen terrain.

Materials and How They Work

Most ski fleeces are crafted from performance fabrics designed to keep you warm, dry, and comfortable across the mountain. These materials support insulation, breathability, and flexibility while remaining lightweight.

  • Polyester: Provides warmth, quick drying performance, and durable comfort across winter conditions.
  • Polyamide: Adds strength and improves abrasion resistance for long term wear.
  • Elastane blends: Allow flexible movement and support a comfortable shape that works well under jackets.
  • Grid knit structures: Improve airflow and moisture control for performance focused designs.
  • Soft brushed fleece: Offers extra warmth and comfort, ideal for cold weather skiing.

These materials work together to create ski fleeces that perform reliably whether you are skiing, hiking, or relaxing after a day on the slopes.

  • Key Features to Look For

Technical ski fleeces often include thoughtful features that support performance, comfort, and ease of wear across the slopes.

  • Breathable fabrics help maintain comfort during skiing and hiking.
  • Stretch panels help support natural movement on the mountain.
  • Half zip designs help reduce bulk when layering.
  • Full zip styles help offer easier venting and flexible wear.
  • Thumb loops help keep sleeves in place underneath jackets.
  • Drop hems help add extra warmth and coverage for cold conditions.
  • Zipped pockets help secure essential items.

These features help ensure your fleece feels comfortable, warm, and ready for winter activities.

  • Choosing Ski Fleeces for Your Activity

Your ideal ski fleece depends on your skiing style, expected weather, and preferred level of warmth. Matching the design to your plans helps you stay comfortable on the slopes.

  • All mountain skiing: Midweight fleeces offer warm, breathable comfort under a shell.
  • Backcountry touring: Stretch or grid fleeces provide moisture control and lightweight performance.
  • Cold resort conditions: Heavyweight fleeces help deliver maximum insulation for comfort.
  • Spring or high output skiing: Microfleece styles help improve breathability and reduce bulk.
  • Après ski and casual wear: Full zip fleeces and hoodies offer stylish warmth in relaxed environments.

Choosing the correct fleece helps ensure comfort and consistent performance through different winter conditions.

  • Frequently asked questions

Do I need a fleece for skiing?

A fleece helps add extra warmth and comfort as part of your mid layer system. It supports temperature regulation during skiing and helps prevent chills in cold weather. Most skiers find a fleece essential for long days on the mountain.

Is a ski fleece the same as a regular fleece?

A ski fleece is designed for performance and breathability, offering features suited to winter sport. Regular fleeces may provide warmth but may not manage moisture or movement as effectively. A technical ski fleece supports comfort across the slopes.

Where does a fleece fit in the ski layering system?

A fleece sits between your base layer and outer jacket as the main mid layer. It helps trap warmth and manage moisture while allowing freedom of movement. This position ensures balanced insulation during changing activity levels.

Can I wear a fleece as an outer layer while skiing?

A fleece can be worn as an outer layer in dry, mild weather or during casual walks around the resort. For wet, snowy, or windy conditions, a waterproof jacket is recommended. Layering appropriately helps maintain warmth and protection.

Warm and cosy ski fleeces for women from Montec

Whether you're out having fun on the slopes, backcountry, or relaxing in the lodge, a cosy and warm ski fleece for women is an absolute necessity for all seasons and occasions. Montec's top fleeces for women are sure to make you feel comfortable and warm no matter where you're headed. With a wide selection of fleece jackets to pick from, including casual designs in colours like green and red, you're sure to find the perfect fit, style, and thickness that's ideal for every season. Pick your favourite easily and quickly online at Montec's store.

Functionality

Fleeces are versatile, lightweight, warm, and breathable, and they have lots of great features for winter sports. Equipped with essential equipment features like adjustable cuffs and hem, they come in various styles including full-zip and half-zips. You can wear them skiing and in all winter activities, providing warmth and comfort on the mountains.

Our ski fleeces are made from recycled polyester, so they're both light and breathable, making them a perfect mid layer when wearing underneath a snow jacket. Whether you're skiing at the resorts, in the backcountry or just relaxing by the fire after a hard day out there, the zips allow you to regulate your body temperature - and keep you warm even if the weather turns cold. And because they feature a chimney collar, your neck has extra protection against wind and cold.

Fleeces: models, sizes and colours

Whether you prefer half-zip construction or a fleece hooded midlayer with a chimney collar, Montec has you covered with plenty of different options to choose from. Choose a ski fleece that fits your style and type of activity; all our designs guarantee the perfect fit and a laid back cool appearance. Montec's ski clothes are highly functional and ideal for all of winter's adventures.

Here at Montec, we offer a wide range of colours to match your style and other ski gear, such as black, green, and red. Our size range goes from XS to XL, ensuring you can choose your perfect fit. Browse the collection and order your favourite for this season on the mountain.

Find the newest collection at Montecwear.com
